# Yubus Formation

**Summary**: A Paleocene formation containing high-energy fluvial sandstones.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2016-awad|Awad, 2016]] analyzed the Yabus Formation to identify its role as a primary reservoir.

## Depositional Environment

- [[2016-awad|Awad, 2016]] fluvial and deltaic environments

## Reservoir Properties

- [[2016-awad|Awad, 2016]] not stated in source

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The most favorable sandstone reservoirs are developed in fluviodeltaic environments in the Yabus Formation. ([[2016-awad|Awad, 2016, p. 18]])

## Conflicting Interpretations Across Sources

- [[2016-awad|Awad, 2016]] not stated in source
